case_title: BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. VS. MOHAMMAD AMIN ZEYADEH ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT ZEYADEH, MOHAMMAD AMIN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-18-2020

STATEMENT OF ACCOUNT (TRANSACTION ID # 200026669) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.
DECLARATION RE: MILITARY STATUS OF DEFENDANT; NOTICE PURSUANT TO CCP 1033(B)(2) (TRANSACTION ID # 200026669) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 200009234), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. SERVED MAR-13-2020, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE MAR-17-2020 AS TO DEFENDANT ZEYADEH, MOHAMMAD AMIN
